criteriaResults.evidence: planRollback @191-268: latest-line-wins grouping, executed-only filter (excludes rolled-back/rolled-back-failed/failed/pending), reverse executedAt sort. Test asserts ['c3','c2','c1'].
executeRollback @355-381 for-loop one ProposedAction per step (classification='risky'). Test: 4-step→4 executor calls; 3-step→3 calls + 3 'rolled-back' ChangeEntries.

rollback.ts CLI registered at src/cli/index.ts:258. Always presents plan unless --json. Confirmation prompt unless --dry-run. appendRollbackExecution writes rollback-execution.jsonl per step (tested 2 entries for 2-step).

--since: strict-after executedAt; throws 'not found in changelog' on unknown id. --dry-run: CLI returns after presentPlan; zero side effects (test verifies zero changelog writes + zero rollback-execution.jsonl).

On failure @402-447: appends 'rolled-back-failed' ChangeEntry + RollbackExecutionEntry + rollback_halted timeline event, escalated:true, remaining=[unexecuted]. 5-step test step-3-fails: callCount===3, remaining.length===2, escalated true, effectiveStatus(step3)='rolled-back-failed', steps[3..4] unchanged 'executed'.

@215-225 guards both missing inverse object and empty inverse.description. Tests verify plan.unrollbackableChanges===1, warnings contain changeId+'no recorded inverse', presentPlan renders Warnings section, CLI stderr surfaces.

27 tests in tests/incident/rollback.test.ts cover all 6 categories: planRollback (7), per-step gate (1), happy-path 3-step (1), --since (3), --dry-run (2), halt-on-failure (3), no-inverse (2), presentPlan (3), shapes (5). Backward compat: 'executed' status from Sprint 19 still parses.
All 4 strategies exit 0. 1000 tests pass, 4 skipped. No regressions.

generatorFeedback.description: Halt-on-failure test doesn't assert effective status 'rolled-back' for plan.steps[0..1] (the two successful steps). Implicit via result.succeeded===2 but not explicit. Non-blocking.
No-inverse warnings populate plan.warnings + CLI stderr but NOT timeline.jsonl audit log. EvaluatorNotes said 'plan + audit + stderr'. Non-blocking — warnings still surface to operator.

No integration test with allowAutopilotRiskyActions=false to verify rollback works under careful/disk mode (real polling). Sprint 20 tests cover this for executeAction; rollback layer inherits via the seam. Non-blocking.

summary: All 8 criteria pass on iter 1. Per-step gating verified by call counts. Halt-on-failure with escalation. --dry-run leaves zero side effects. No-inverse handling defensive. 1000 tests, +27 from baseline 973. Three low-priority quality notes (audit-log writes, explicit per-step status assertions, autopilot-disk integration test) tracked for future polish.
